lines: If we add one more star, how many will we have, {player}?
Taking away is just finding what's left behind.
Math is like magic when you know the rules, {player}!
no_quest_line: You're a master of math magic, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I'm trying to solve this starry puzzle. Will you help me with the numbers, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Plus this, minus that... you're doing great, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Puzzle solved! Your math magic is truly impressive, {player}.
